decisions.briefing: Markets were mixed today — S&P 500 barely positive while the NASDAQ slipped 0.4%, hinting at mild rotation away from tech. With only $477 in cash (just below the $500 buy threshold), no new positions can be opened today. Existing holdings stay put as the portfolio sits at a healthy +31.6% overall; top screener names like MU, MXL, and KLAC remain on watch for the next cash reload.

market_education.summary_en: Today's session showed a mild divergence between the S&P 500 (+0.1%) and the tech-heavy NASDAQ (-0.4%), suggesting a modest rotation out of high-growth technology names into broader market sectors. Semiconductor and equipment stocks — MU, KLAC, AMAT — continued to show strong individual momentum despite index-level softness, indicating stock-specific strength can persist even when the sector index dips. With no major macro catalysts in play, the session looks like a routine consolidation pause after recent market gains.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日美股走勢分化，標普500指數微升0.1%，而以科技股為主的納斯達克指數則下跌0.4%，反映市場資金出現輪動跡象，從高成長科技板塊流向其他較防守性的資產。儘管指數偏弱，半導體個股如MU、KLAC及AMAT的技術走勢依然強勁，顯示個別股票的基本面動能不受整體板塊拖累。整體而言，市場在近期升浪後進入整固階段，缺乏明確宏觀催化劑引導方向。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation happens when investors move capital from one part of the market to another — often from growth sectors (like tech) into value or defensive sectors — in response to shifting economic expectations or risk appetite. Today's split, where the NASDAQ fell while the S&P 500 held flat, is a textbook signal: money left high-growth tech names but stayed in the broader market. Tracking these rotations helps investors stay ahead of which sectors are gaining or losing momentum.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊輪動是指投資者將資金從一個市場板塊轉移至另一個板塊，通常是從成長型板塊（如科技股）轉向價值型或防守型資產，以因應經濟預期或風險偏好的變化。今日納指下跌而標普500持平，正是資金流出高成長科技股、但留守大市的典型訊號。掌握板塊輪動規律，有助投資者提早識別哪些板塊正蓄積動能，哪些則開始退潮。
